name: Chest X-Ray PA and Lateral
description: Standard chest radiograph with PA and lateral views for evaluation of thoracic pathology

findings.technique: PA and lateral chest radiographs were obtained.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Lungs
sections.content: The lungs are [clear / no consolidation / no mass / no infiltrate]. The lung volumes are [adequate / normal].

sections.name: Pulmonary Vessels
sections.content: The pulmonary vessels are [normal in caliber / not enlarged / no engorgement]. The hilum is [normal / not enlarged].

sections.name: Heart and Mediastinum
sections.content: The heart size is [normal / not enlarged]. The mediastinal contours are [normal / no mass / no widening]. The trachea is [midline / not deviated].

sections.name: Pleura
sections.content: The bilateral pleura demonstrate [no effusion / no thickening / no pneumothorax]. No pleural-based masses.

sections.name: Osseous
sections.content: The thoracic vertebrae and ribs demonstrate [no fracture / no lytic or blastic lesion]. No bony abnormality.

sections.name: Soft Tissues
sections.content: The chest wall soft tissues are [unremarkable / no mass / no infiltrate].

sections.name: Upper Abdomen
sections.content: The bilateral hemidiaphragms are [intact / well-visualized]. The costophrenic angles are [sharp / no blunting].

impression:
1. Normal chest radiograph.
2. No acute cardiopulmonary process.
author: RadReport Templates
